text:
Created attachment 241628
Kanboard Update to 1.2.28

Wanted to get rid of some deprecation warnings on PHP 8.1 (which was fixed in 1.2.24, so here's the latest version (1.2.28)!

Changes: https://github.com/kanboard/kanboard/releases/tag/v1.2.28

Added BUILD_DEPENDS on devel/py-setuptools_scm and USES python:3.8+
